prompt: Create an image: A city skyline of Mumbai seen through rising water, the lower half of buildings submerged, the Gateway of India monument partially underwater, calm ominous water reflecting the sky, muted blue-gray tones, no text, no labels, no chart, no infographic, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, melancholic
concept: Rising waters slowly consuming a city's identity and landmarks
metaphor: The Gateway of India partially submerged represents the threshold between what was and what will be lost
